fields.name: remainingMs
fields.description: Milliseconds remaining on the active cooldown.
fields.synonyms: time left, remaining, countdown, ms left

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the cooldown is currently counting down.
fields.synonyms: cooling, on cooldown, busy, in progress

events.name: CooldownReady
events.description: Fired when the cooldown expires; wire to re-enable the ability or action.

events.name: EXPIRE
events.description: Internal: fired by the expiry tick to drive the cooling→ready transition.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Default cooldown duration (ms)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Milliseconds the cooldown runs when START is received without an explicit durationMs payload.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: cooldown time, duration, delay, recharge time, wait time
